summary: Tiered Offers System and Share Trip Score Testing Complete - All features working. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified.

issues: Share Trip Score button requires scrolling to see - consider moving higher in the list

critical_code_review_comments: Tiered discount system correctly implemented: Basic=6%, Premium=18%
Admin offers correctly give 18% to all users regardless of plan
Gem multiplier correctly set: Basic=1x, Premium=2x
Offer redemption correctly prevents double redemption
Share Trip Score modal displays all trip stats correctly
Social sharing buttons (Twitter, Instagram, Copy Text, Save as Image) all present
Plan Selection onboarding shows correct pricing ($0 Basic, $10.99 Premium with 35% founders discount)
Car color selection onboarding works with Standard and Metallic color options
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: Backend has 5 seed offers: Shell Gas Station, Starbucks Downtown, Quick Shine Car Wash, SnapRoad Partner Deal (admin), BP Gas Station
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tiered Offers and Share Trip Score features complete. Plan Selection → Car Color → Main App flow working. Offers show 6% for Basic users, 18% for Premium users and admin offers.
